description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist geometric design. The front facade features large floor-to-ceiling windows on the lower level and a partially open balcony with a hammock and glass railings on the upper level. The exterior is primarily white with some gray and wooden accent elements, and the house sits on a green lawn with a small entry sign and potted plants flanking the entrance. The rear and side facades are more closed, with minimal window openings and clean, unadorned surfaces. The upper floor includes an open terrace area, visible from the front, and the overall structure emphasizes straight lines and right angles. The house appears to be constructed mainly from concrete, glass, and metal, with some wood used for accent features.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large front windows, and a partially open upper balcony. The exterior is white with minimalist lines and some wooden and glass accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing large windows, a balcony with a hammock, potted plants, and the main entryway.
description_view_1: Rear view with mostly solid white walls, minimal windows, and a small window on the upper floor.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the solid upper story, open terrace, and a wooden accent visible on the upper floor.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a small window on the lower floor and a mostly closed upper story.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, flanked by potted plants, no porch or steps, and a clean, minimalist appearance.
